mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkins (id, activity_id, user_id, checked_in_at, rating, notes, lat, lng, auto_checkin) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, NOW(), #{rating}, #{notes}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{autoCheckin})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY checked_in_at DESC
SELECT c.* FROM checkins c JOIN activities a ON c.activity_id = a.id WHERE a.trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY c.checked_in_at DESC
SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
SELECT * FROM checkins WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ORDER BY checked_in_at DESC
